_doc: Launch original sectional — Geometry. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: Two angles of a triangle are 50° and 60°. Find the third angle.
questions.stem_hi: एक triangle के दो angles 50° और 60° हैं। तीसरा angle ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Added the two given angles and reported 110°. Triangle angles must sum to 180°.
options.trap_reason_hi: दो दिए angles add करके 110° लिख दिया। Triangle angles का sum 180° होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used 360° as if it were a quadrilateral or full circle. A triangle uses 180°.
options.trap_reason_hi: 360° use किया जैसे quadrilateral/full circle हो। Triangle में 180° use होता है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Took the difference of the two angles. The third angle is found from the total sum, not the difference.
options.trap_reason_hi: दो angles का difference लिया। Third angle total sum से निकलता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Triangle angle sum = 180°. Third angle = 180-50-60 = 70°. Therefore, answer = 70°.
questions.explanation_concept_en: The interior angles of every Euclidean triangle add to 180 degrees, so any missing angle is the remainder after subtracting known angles. Final answer is 70°.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Triangle angle sum = 180°। Third angle = 180-50-60 = 70°। अतः answer = 70°।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: हर Euclidean triangle के interior angles का sum 180° होता है। Missing angle known angles घटाकर मिलता है। Final answer 70° है।

questions.stem_en: Find the sum of interior angles of a 5-sided polygon.
questions.stem_hi: 5-sided polygon के interior angles का sum ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used n×180 and forgot that a polygon divides into n-2 triangles.
options.trap_reason_hi: n×180 लगा दिया; polygon n-2 triangles में divide होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used n-1 triangles instead of n-2 triangles.
options.trap_reason_hi: n-2 की जगह n-1 triangles मान लिए।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used exterior angle sum 360° instead of interior angle sum.
options.trap_reason_hi: Interior sum की जगह exterior angle sum 360° दे दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Interior angle sum = (n-2)×180 = (5-2)×180 = 540°. Therefore, answer = 540°.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Joining one vertex to non-adjacent vertices partitions an n-sided polygon into n-2 triangles. Each triangle contributes 180 degrees. Final answer is 540°.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Interior angle sum = (n-2)×180 = (5-2)×180 = 540°। अतः answer = 540°।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: एक vertex से diagonals खींचने पर n-sided polygon n-2 triangles में बँटता है। हर triangle 180° देता है। Final answer 540° है।

questions.stem_en: Find the circumference of a circle of radius 7 cm. Use π = 22/7.
questions.stem_hi: Radius 7 cm वाले circle की circumference ज्ञात कीजिए। π = 22/7 लें।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Found area πr² instead of circumference 2πr.
options.trap_reason_hi: Circumference 2πr की जगह area πr² निकाल दिया।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used πr and missed the factor 2 in circumference.
options.trap_reason_hi: πr लिया और circumference का factor 2 छोड़ दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Found diameter 2r only and ignored π.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ diameter 2r निकाला, π ignore किया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Circumference = 2πr = 2×22/7×7 = 44 cm. Therefore, answer = 44 cm.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Circumference is the boundary length of the circle; it is proportional to radius through the constant 2π. Final answer is 44 cm.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Circumference = 2πr = 2×22/7×7 = 44 cm। अतः answer = 44 cm।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Circumference circle की boundary length है; यह radius के साथ 2π multiplier से proportional है। Final answer 44 cm है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Circumference = 2πr = 2×22/7×21 = 132 cm. Therefore, answer = 132 cm.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Circumference is the boundary length of the circle; it is proportional to radius through the constant 2π. Final answer is 132 cm.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Circumference = 2πr = 2×22/7×21 = 132 cm। अतः answer = 132 cm।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Circumference circle की boundary length है; यह radius के साथ 2π multiplier से proportional है। Final answer 132 cm है।

questions.stem_en: Two angles are complementary. If one angle is 30°, find the other.
questions.stem_hi: दो angles complementary हैं। एक angle 30° है, दूसरा ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Used supplementary sum 180° instead of complementary sum 90°.
options.trap_reason_hi: Complementary 90° की जगह supplementary 180° use किया।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Repeated the given angle. Complementary angles add to 90°, so the other must be the remainder.
options.trap_reason_hi: Given angle ही repeat कर दिया। Complementary angles का sum 90° होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added 30 to 90 instead of subtracting from 90.
options.trap_reason_hi: 90 से subtract करने की जगह 30 add कर दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Complementary angles add to 90°. Other angle = 90-30 = 60°. Therefore, answer = 60°.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Complementary is a fixed-pair relation with total 90 degrees; the missing angle is the balance from 90. Final answer is 60°.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Complementary angles का sum 90°। दूसरा angle = 90-30 = 60°। अतः answer = 60°।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Complementary relation में total 90° fixed होता है; missing angle 90 से balance है। Final answer 60° है।
